---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the Steel Manufacturing System
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement, needs-discussion'
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Request

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## 💡 Solution Description

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📋 Module/Area

Which part of the system would this feature affect?

- [ ] Authentication & User Management
- [ ] Raw Materials Management
- [ ] Production Planning
- [ ] Inventory Management
- [ ] Quality Assurance
- [ ] Logistics & Shipment
- [ ] Analytics & Reporting
- [ ] UI/UX Improvements
- [ ] Database & Performance
- [ ] Integration & APIs
- [ ] Security & Compliance
- [ ] Other (specify): ___________

## 🎯 Use Case

**Describe your use case**
Explain how this feature would be used and who would benefit from it.

## 📊 Expected Impact

**Business Value:**
- [ ] Improves efficiency
- [ ] Reduces manual work
- [ ] Enhances user experience
- [ ] Provides better insights
- [ ] Increases system reliability
- [ ] Other: ___________

**Technical Impact:**
- [ ] Low complexity to implement
- [ ] Medium complexity
- [ ] High complexity
- [ ] Requires database changes
- [ ] Requires UI changes
- [ ] Requires new dependencies

## 🖼️ Mockups/Wireframes

If you have any visual representations of your idea, please include them here.

## 📝 Acceptance Criteria

**What would make this feature complete?**
- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

**Are there any technical constraints or requirements?**
- Database changes needed: Yes/No
- Performance implications: Low/Medium/High
- Security considerations: Yes/No
- Third-party integrations: Yes/No

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

## 🏆 Priority

**How important is this feature to you?**
- [ ] Critical - Blocks current workflow
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have improvement
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

---

**Note:** Feature requests will be reviewed and discussed before being added to the roadmap. Please be patient as we evaluate the best way to implement new features.
